name: Old Fashioned Cabbage Dinner (Southern Style)
recipeIngredient: 2 lbs corned beef or smoked ham hocks
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and cut the cabbage into 6 to 8 sections.
2. Scrape the carrots and potatoes.
3. Cut the peppers into quarters.
4. Let vegetables stand in cold water.
5. Boil corned beef or ham hocks until well done, ensuring no more than 2 cups of water remain in the pot with the meat.
6. Add vegetables to the meat.
7. Sprinkle onions and all vegetables with salt, pepper, paprika, and celery seed.
8. Continue boiling for no longer than half an hour.
9. When potatoes and carrots are done, serve the cabbage.
10. Place vegetables and meat attractively on a large platter.
11. Sprinkle with fresh chopped parsley and serve with cornbread.
12. Optionally, add whole fresh tomatoes in the last 10 minutes for color or substitute with green beans.
